persona_notes: Cooperative gig-economy worker, temporary income dip, keeps her word

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: The agent initiated contact with the borrower.
turn_outcomes.text: Hi Priya, this is Collections reaching out on behalf of Freo regarding your pending EMI of ₹4,500. Hope you're doing well.
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower mentions financial difficulties
turn_outcomes.text: Hi, yeah I know, things have been a bit tight since my rides dropped this month.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No clear resolution or promise made by the borrower.
turn_outcomes.text: Totally understand, the gig income can be unpredictable. Would a part payment work, or do you need a few more days?
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower has made a payment proposal.
turn_outcomes.text: I can pay ₹2,000 by this Friday and the rest by the 15th.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No new payment has been made yet.
turn_outcomes.text: That works, I'll note it down. We'll check in on Friday then.
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: The borrower made a partial payment as promised.
turn_outcomes.text: Hi Priya, following up — we saw the ₹2,000 came through on Friday, thank you! Are we still on track for the 15th for the remaining ₹2,500?
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower confirms they are on track with the payment plan.
turn_outcomes.text: Yes, picked up extra shifts this week, should be no problem.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Payment has been completed as promised.
turn_outcomes.text: Hi Priya, just confirming the remaining ₹2,500 went through yesterday on the 15th — all settled now. Thanks for staying in touch through this.
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: The borrower has confirmed the payment is done and thanked the agent, indicating no change in state.
turn_outcomes.text: Yes, glad that's done. Thanks for being patient with me.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

persona_notes: Genuine medical hardship, agent should route to support not pressure

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: The agent initiated contact regarding the pending payment.
turn_outcomes.text: Good afternoon, this is regarding your loan with Nira, the payment for last month is still pending. Can we talk about it?
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower mentioned a family hardship.
turn_outcomes.text: I'm sorry, my father was hospitalized last month and everything went towards that. I genuinely don't have it right now.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Agent offered restructuring into smaller installments
turn_outcomes.text: I'm really sorry to hear that. Let's not worry about the full amount right now — would it help if we looked at restructuring this into smaller installments once things settle?
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No payment or promise update was made.
turn_outcomes.text: That would actually help a lot, yes.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No payment or confirmation of payment was made.
turn_outcomes.text: Okay, I'll flag this for our restructuring team to reach out with options. No pressure on the original date.
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No new information indicates a state change.
turn_outcomes.text: Hi, following up — did our restructuring team reach out with the revised plan?
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower agreed to the new plan and confirmed its feasibility.
turn_outcomes.text: Yes, I agreed to the new plan, ₹1,500 a month starting next week. That works for me.
turn_outcomes.speaker: borrower

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: No new information was provided to change the state.
turn_outcomes.text: Great, noting that down. Thank you for working through this with us.
turn_outcomes.speaker: agent

persona_notes: Disputes the amount initially, dispute is legitimate (duplicate charge), resolves cleanly

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: The agent initiated contact with the borrower.

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower has made a promise to pay the remaining amount
turn_outcomes.text: Good, thanks for checking. I'll pay the remaining ₹4,200 by next week.

turn_outcomes.text: Perfect, noted. Apologies for the confusion earlier.

turn_outcomes.text: Hi Arjun, confirming the ₹4,200 was received yesterday — your account is fully settled now.

turn_outcomes.transition_reason: Borrower confirms satisfaction with account settlement.
turn_outcomes.text: Great, thank you.
